chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1749 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 15.11.2023 Mr. Ali Murad Malano, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioners are regular employees of Public Health Engineering Department, and filed this petition for release of their salaries from 2014 to 2017. Learned AAG Sindh through statement has filed comments on behalf of respondent No.5 stating that the matter was taken up by the Scrutiny Committee in the meeting dated 10.09.2020, but the issue was deferred for want of requisite documents. However, as and when the documents are received, the requisite action would be taken as per rules, policy and law. In view of above, this petition is disposed of, and the respondents are directed to do the needful within a period of three months and submit the report. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
